user.title: Device Information
user.description: Enter the details of your Akuvox device.

data_description.mac_address: The MAC address of the device (e.g., 0C:11:05:28:F6:82)
data_description.device_ip: The IP address of the device on your local network
data_description.api_username: Username for the device API (default: admin)

relays.title: Relay Configuration
relays.description: Configure each relay output on the device. You can optionally create a lock entity for relays connected to door locks.

inputs.title: Input Configuration
inputs.description: Configure each dry-contact input on the device.
